amr_stewardship_review.stewardship_rule_application: Watch-category antibiotic requires stewardship review for resistance risk. High similarity to existing Watch comparator ciprofloxacin plus rising GLASS resistance supports restricted authorization. RxNorm snapshot rxnorm_snapshot_2026-04-11 normalized product identity to levofloxacin. WHO AWaRe snapshot who_aware_snapshot_2026-04-11 resolved levofloxacin as watch. WHO GLASS snapshot who_glass_snapshot_2026-04-11 resolved levofloxacin trend as rising. Chemistry snapshot chemistry_similarity_snapshot_2026-04-11 resolved Watch similarity as high against comparator ciprofloxacin. Chemistry snapshot provided active moiety levofloxacin, parent compound levofloxacin, PubChem CID 149096, ChEMBL CHEMBL1433, and UniChem UC149096.
findings: RxNorm snapshot rxnorm_snapshot_2026-04-11 normalized product identity to levofloxacin.
WHO AWaRe snapshot who_aware_snapshot_2026-04-11 resolved levofloxacin as watch.
WHO GLASS snapshot who_glass_snapshot_2026-04-11 resolved levofloxacin trend as rising.
Chemistry snapshot chemistry_similarity_snapshot_2026-04-11 resolved Watch similarity as high against comparator ciprofloxacin.
Chemistry snapshot provided active moiety levofloxacin, parent compound levofloxacin, PubChem CID 149096, ChEMBL CHEMBL1433, and UniChem UC149096.

findings_register.issue: Mandatory administrative application section is missing.
findings_register.recommendation: Provide the required administrative section and supporting documents.

findings_register.issue: Manufacturing quality evidence indicates GMP non-compliance, expiry, or missing support.
findings_register.recommendation: Resolve GMP deficiencies and provide current manufacturing evidence.

findings_register.workflow_step: AMR stewardship review using AWaRe rules
findings_register.issue: AWaRe-controlled antimicrobial requires restricted authorization or stewardship caution.
findings_register.violated_rule: Watch / Reserve stewardship-sensitive products should trigger stewardship caution
findings_register.recommendation: Document the stewardship restriction and reviewer control measures.

findings_register.issue: Shelf-life claims could not be cross-checked against a mapped stability section.
findings_register.violated_rule: Claim not supported by evidence = violation
findings_register.recommendation: Provide or correctly map the stability section before finalizing the review.

findings: No stability section was mapped, so shelf-life claims cannot be cross-checked.

notes: Administrative completeness review could not be confirmed because the administrative section was not mapped.
AMR stewardship review was completed using WHO AWaRe and the source-backed stewardship policy path.

overall_judgment.justification: The final verdict reflects the full structured review, including naming safety, technical adequacy, stewardship policy, and recorded rule violations.
blocking_issues: Mandatory administrative application section is missing.
Manufacturing quality evidence indicates GMP non-compliance, expiry, or missing support.
AWaRe-controlled antimicrobial requires restricted authorization or stewardship caution.
Shelf-life claims could not be cross-checked against a mapped stability section.
